name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar
role: Chairman of Drafting Committee & Father of Constitution
majorContributions: Termed the Directive Principles of State Policy as 'novel features' of the Indian Constitution and emphasized their role in establishing economic democracy alongside political democracy.

name: Sardar Swaran Singh
majorContributions: Recommended the inclusion of Fundamental Duties in the Constitution during Emergency, leading to the enactment of Part IVA (Article 51A) by the 42nd Amendment Act.
sscTrick: Swaran Singh = 8 Duties Recommended (10 Enacted in 1976).

name: Granville Austin
majorContributions: Described Fundamental Rights (Part III) and Directive Principles (Part IV) together as the 'Conscience of the Constitution'.

name: Justice J.S. Verma
role: Former Chief Justice of India & Chairman of Verma Committee (1999)
majorContributions: Headed the committee that identified existing legal frameworks and statutes for enforcing specific Fundamental Duties across India.
sscTrick: Verma Committee = Legal Enforcement of Fundamental Duties.
